query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE (name LIKE '%test%' OR phone LIKE '%test%' OR email LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%ęµ‹čÆ•%' OR phone LIKE '%000%') AND phone NOT IN ('13860029testtest', '13800138013') AND (email IS NULL OR email != '526test@example.com')) as test_users_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teachers WHERE (name LIKE '%test%' OR phone LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%ęµ‹čÆ•%' OR phone LIKE '%000%') AND phone NOT IN ('13860029testtest', '13800138013')) as test_teachers_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM partners WHERE (name LIKE '%test%' OR phone LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%ęµ‹čÆ•%' OR phone LIKE '%000%') AND phone NOT IN ('13860029testtest', '13800138013')) as test_partners_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE customerName LIKE '%test%' OR deliveryTeacher LIKE '%test%' OR customerName LIKE '%ęµ‹čÆ•%' OR deliveryTeacher LIKE '%ęµ‹čÆ•%') as test_orders_count;
